title: bidens populifolia
intro: Bidens populifolia, also known as the cleft-leaf beggar-ticks, is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Bidens populifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antimicrobial protection against various pathogens. Herbal preparations of Bidens populifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in natural remedies for skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
